title: Uiopik's Skyblock
description: a skyblock modpack that has alot of options to advance
body:
From one block... To endless possibilities!

I’ve always loved the idea of Skyblock, starting with just a single tree and a block of dirt, and slowly turning it into an entire world.
I’m a huge fan of the SkyFactory series, and I wanted to create something that lets you progress at your own pace, while giving you tons of options to expand, automate, and build massive machinery!

Whether you enjoy creative engineering, automation, or just watching your island evolve from nothing to a thriving base, this pack gives you the freedom to play your way.

I've played this modpack with my friends and you can do the same!

Disclaimer:

None of the mods are mine, all credit goes to the original mod creators.
If you have questions, issues, or suggestions about the modpack, feel free to contact me on Discord: uiopik
